title: Flatten a List of Lists
description: Given a nested list x where each element is a list of integers (list can be empty), return a single flat list (i.e., not nested) containing all the integers in order. For instance: Input=[[1, 2, 3], [4, 5], [6, 7]], Output=[1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7]
inputFormat: A list of lists of integers (i.e., a nested list)
outputFormat: A single flat list of integers
